pi_items.source: Verified via environment setup script (scripts/setup_wordpress.sh) which initializes the site with `wp core install --title="My WordPress Blog"`.

pi_items.metadata_value: A WordPress blog for testing and demonstrations
pi_items.verified_value: A WordPress blog for testing and demonstrations
pi_items.source: Verified via environment setup script (scripts/setup_wordpress.sh) which explicitly sets `wp option update blogdescription "A WordPress blog for testing and demonstrations"`.
Verified via environment setup script (scripts/setup_wordpress.sh) which explicitly sets `wp option update timezone_string "America/Los_Angeles"`.
Verified via setup_task.sh which injects the issue by running `wp user create service_worker svc_worker@malicious-domain.xyz --role=administrator`.
Verified via setup_task.sh which systematically performs 7 distinct injections that directly correspond to these issues.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the WordPress environment is synthetically configured with the original title 'My WordPress Blog', tagline 'A WordPress blog for testing and demonstrations', and timezone 'America/Los_Angeles' via the environment setup scripts. Also confirmed that the task setup script simulates a site compromise by dynamically injecting exactly 7 misconfigurations (spam title, spam tagline, blank permalinks, disabled comment moderation, open registration for administrators, and timezone changed to UTC) and creating a rogue administrator account named 'service_worker'.
